case_title: CHOICE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL, INC. VS. BHARATKUMAR PATEL et al

docket_entries.description: ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHOICE HOTELS INTERNATIONAL, INC.
